options.label: Legged (Bipedal)
options.description: Robot walks on two legs like humans

options.label: Gantry
options.description: Robot moves on overhead gantry system

options.label: Legged (Other)
options.description: Robot walks on legs but not 2, 4, or 6

options.label: Rail-mounted
options.description: Robot moves along fixed rails or tracks

options.label: Stationary/Fixed
options.description: Robot is permanently fixed in one location

options.label: Tracked
options.description: Robot moves on continuous tracks like a tank
